evidence_snippet: Hugh is held with the rest of Margaery's accused lovers in a dungeon under the charge of [Qyburn]
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Dance with Dragons

evidence_snippet: Queen [Cersei Lannister] has an arrest warrant signed for Hugh as part of her plans to remove Margaery. He is sent to the dungeons after his arrest
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Feast for Crows
